default.text: ⟦⟦ S̃õm̃ẽ ñõt̃ẽs̃ ãr̃ẽ h̃ãr̃d̃ t̃õ r̃ẽãd̃ ãt̃ ã g̃l̃ãñc̃ẽ. ⟧⟧

low_visibility.text: ⟦⟦ Õṽẽr̃l̃ãp̃p̃ĩñg̃ õr̃ c̃õm̃p̃ãc̃t̃ ñõt̃ẽs̃ r̃ẽd̃ũc̃ẽ ṽĩs̃ũãl̃ c̃l̃ãr̃ĩt̃ỹ. ⟧⟧

tiny_notes.text: ⟦⟦ S̃m̃ãl̃l̃ ñõt̃ẽ s̃ĩz̃ẽs̃ c̃ãñ b̃ẽ ẽãs̃ỹ t̃õ m̃ĩs̃s̃. ⟧⟧

cluttered.text: ⟦⟦ Ṽĩs̃ũãl̃ c̃l̃ũt̃t̃ẽr̃ c̃ãñ m̃ãk̃ẽ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñs̃ h̃ãr̃d̃ẽr̃ t̃õ p̃ãr̃s̃ẽ. ⟧⟧
